channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Uber is replacing Lyft in a points partnership with Delta
item.description: Lyft and Delta are ending their points-earning loyalty partnership in April and the airline will start a new program with rideshare competitor Uber. Uber announced the multi-year strategic partnership on Tuesday evening at the CES tech conference in Las Vegas.
item.dc:creator: Jessica Bursztynsky, Fast Company

item.title: Amazon's Jeff Bezos Pays $40 Million for Melania Trump Documentary
item.description: Jeff Bezos' Amazon film and television studio will pay $40 million to license the rights to a documentary about Melania Trump, according to a report by Puck co-founder Matthew Belloni.
item.dc:creator: Martha Ross, The Mercury News

item.title: How high do you want your frame rates? Nvidia boasts that RTX 5090 GPU can drive Valorant at over 800 fps with jaw-dropping low latency
item.description: Nvidia claims RTX 5090 exceeds 800 fps in Valorant – and that it’s a pro gamer’s dream GPU for low latency and smooth frame rates.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang says he’d be delighted to meet and congratulate Donald Trump
item.description: As head of the world’s most valuable chipmaker, Huang has an opportunity to help steer the administration’s AI policy at a moment of rapid change
item.dc:creator: Bloomberg, The Mercury News

item.title: Meta looking for 'sweetheart deal' with Trump: FTC chair
item.description: Outgoing Federal Trade Commission (FTC) Chair Lina Khan suggested Tuesday that Meta and other companies facing antitrust lawsuits from the agency might be looking for “sweetheart deals” from the incoming Trump administration.
item.dc:creator: Julia Shapero, The Hill

item.title: Google fires back as Microsoft is accused of 'tricking' people into using Bing
item.description: Google vs Microsoft fight gets ugly as Chrome boss accuses company of 'spoofing the Google homepage'.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: The Last of Us season 2's new teaser has fans gushing over every detail it contains, but some are also concerned about the welfare of one of its new cast members
item.description: The Last of Us season 2's latest round of footage is full of moments lifted directly from Naughty Dog's video game franchise.
item.dc:creator: tom.power@futurenet.com (Tom Power), TechRadar

item.title: Meta's new board includes UFC boss Dana White, a familiar figure in Trump's orbit
item.description: Meta has appointed three new members to its board of directors, including Dana White, the president and CEO of Ultimate Fighting Championship and a familiar figure in the orbit of incoming President Donald Trump.
item.dc:creator: KELVIN CHAN, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Opinion: California, don’t let 3 companies hog all the AI infrastructure
item.description: The massive computer power needed to train AI should be a public resource, not controlled by private tech firms.
item.dc:creator: Natalie Foster, The Mercury News

item.title: No iPhone, no problem – this Batman-style location tracker brings satellite messaging to any smartphone
item.description: HMD has announced the HMD OffGrid, a location tracker that brings satellite communication capabilities to any smartphone.
item.dc:creator: axel.metz@futurenet.com (Axel Metz), TechRadar

item.title: Navigating the cloud maze: A 5-phase approach to optimizing cloud strategies
item.description: In today’s fast-paced digital landscape, the cloud has emerged as a cornerstone of modern business infrastructure, offering unparalleled scalability, agility, and cost-efficiency.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Battle bots: RPA and agentic AI
item.description: I was recently speaking with a client who stated, “We’ve been doing RPA (robotic process automation) for years. What’s the difference with agentic AI? Should I really care, or is it all part of the GenAI hype?” Valid question.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: China protests U.S. Treasury’s sanctions for hacking incidents
item.description: China has slammed a decision by the U.S. Treasury to sanction a Beijing-based cybersecurity company for its alleged role in multiple hacking incidents targeting critical U.S. infrastructure, while the Chinese cybersecurity agency complained Monday of attacks on Chinese networks.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fast Company

item.title: UFC boss Dana White joining Meta's board of directors
item.description: Ultimate Fighting Championship (UFC) CEO and President Dana White will join Meta’s board of directors, the social media company announced Monday.
item.dc:creator: Julia Shapero, The Hill

item.title: CISA says 'no indication' other agencies impacted by Treasury hack
item.description: The Cybersecurity and Infrastructure Security Agency (CISA) said Monday that there is “no indication” other federal agencies were impacted by the recent breach at the Treasury Department.
item.dc:creator: Julia Shapero, The Hill

item.title: Fubo combining with Disney's Hulu + Live TV; lawsuit against Venu Sports settled
item.description: Disney's Hulu + Live TV and sports streaming service Fubo are combining in a deal that will also see the settlement of a lawsuit against the creation of Venu Sports.
item.dc:creator: MICHELLE CHAPMAN, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Hackers Exploit Browser Extensions, Exposing Millions of Users
item.description: Hackers are exploiting browser extensions to steal sensitive user data, compromising over 2.6 million Chrome users and highlighting the importance of reviewing and removing unused or suspicious extensions.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: China protests US sanctions for its alleged role in hacking, complains of foreign hacker attacks
item.description: BANGKOK (AP) — China has slammed a decision by the U.S. Treasury to sanction a Beijing-based cybersecurity company for its alleged role in multiple hacking incidents targeting critical U.S. infrastructure, while the Chinese cyber security agency complained Monday of attacks on Chinese networks.
item.dc:creator: ELAINE KURTENBACH, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Create custom visuals on your iPhone with Image Playground in iOS 18.2
item.description: Apple's Image Playground transforms text prompts into images or animations in seconds, brining a world of creativity to the palm of your hand.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: NASA's Martian helicopter promises unprecedented views of the red planet
item.description: NASA's Ingenuity helicopter, which flew on Mars in April 2021, became the first aircraft to achieve powered, controlled flight on a planet other than Earth.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Linux filesystems: Ext4, Btrfs, XFS, ZFS and more
item.description: Linux supports quite a few filesystem types. Your choice of which filesystem to use can play an important role in optimizing performance, reliability and data integrity. Among the more popular filesystems are Ext4, Btrfs, XFS and ZFS. Each is widely used and offers some unique features and benefits.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Elon Musk stays on brand following Tesla Cybertruck explosion
item.description: Elon Musk used his X account to defend the durability of Tesla's Cybertruck after the New Year's Las Vegas explosion.
item.dc:creator: Jeff Arnold, NewsNation

item.title: The cloud architecture renaissance of 2025
item.description: The perfect storm is coming that will force enterprises to rethink their cloud strategy. Cloud architecture will take center stage during 2025. This isn’t just another hype cycle. First, we need to talk about the elephant in the room: generative AI.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: The US government must keep pace with serving an AI-empowered citizenry
item.description: Our government needs to maintain trust through competence, and that competence will increasingly be about powering government services with AI. The post The US government must keep pace with serving an AI-empowered citizenry first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: commentators, Federal News Network
